metadata.description: A collection of agent skills and plugins for development workflows

plugins.name: pixijs
plugins.description: PixiJS v8 development guide with bundled API references, code patterns, and best practices from official documentation.

plugins.name: animation-library
plugins.description: Decision-support dossier for picking a JS/TS motion or rendering library — 30 libraries (GSAP, Motion, three.js, PixiJS, Rive, Lottie, Remotion, and more) with a cross-library comparison matrix and per-library dossiers.
